seo.title: Manage PDF pages - Delete, reorder, and rotate pages
seo.description: Manage PDF pages in your browser, remove extra pages, reorder, rotate, and export a new file.

lead: Delete, reorder, and rotate PDF pages for scans and multi-page document cleanup.

strings.heroLead: Upload a PDF, remove pages, change order, rotate pages, and export the cleaned result.
strings.dropLead: Drop a PDF here, or choose a local file with the button.
strings.largeFileTip: To control browser memory, large files may use numbered placeholders instead of thumbnails.
strings.resultLead: The managed PDF will appear here.
